author: Martin Dallinger
name: LongCtx No-QV QK5.25 + AsymLogit + LQER g32/top4 + TTT-local 0.80 + MatrixLR 0.028
code_changes_vs_parent: none (env-var-only retune; train_gpt.py byte-identical to parent, md5 2a7e36e29aa5b5811abb6170059aa8d1)

comparison_pr1493_merged_sota.notes: well above 0.005-nat record threshold; matched-seed paired t-test not possible because #1493 used different seed pool

paired_one_sided_t_test_005nat_threshold.notes: 0.00234-nat improvement is below 0.005-nat margin; cannot claim record against #2007 by strict criterion

record_threshold_assessment: Vs currently merged SOTA PR #1493 (1.0810): improvement ~0.0231 BPB / ~0.051 nats, signal-to-noise ~50; strict record threshold (>=0.005 nats at p<0.01) is satisfied with very wide margin even though seed pools differ. Vs PR #2007 (still under review): paired 3-seed improvement is only ~0.00234 nats, p=0.011 — does NOT meet p<0.01 and does NOT meet the 0.005-nat magnitude bar. If #2007 is merged before this PR is reviewed, this submission is offered as a non-record tuning improvement on top of #2007, not a record claim against #2007.
technique_summary: Forks PR #2007 (LongCtx No-QV QK5.25 + AsymLogit, 1.0590). Five env-only knob retunes: MATRIX_LR=0.028, LQER_RANK=2, LQER_TOP_K=4, LQER_ASYM_GROUP=32, TTT_LOCAL_LR_MULT=0.80. No code changes; train_gpt.py is byte-identical to parent. Same CaseOps/SP8192 stack, 2560-token eval/TTT, no-QV LoRA TTT, prefix-3000 phased TTT, eval-only asymmetric logit rescale, AWQ-lite mixed-precision GPTQ, per-group lrzip compression.
